violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Under counter reach in cooler by grill noted above 41 degrees F. All product was discarded.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained. Some reach in cooler interiors noted not properly maintained.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area. Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Under grill drawer reach in cooler noted with no thermometer. Reach in coolers noted without thermometers.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers in the front kitchen area noted in need of cleaning.
